TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr-puratu_Muu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: 'una kani mamarang kanakanavu miana.
S.PHON: ʔuna kani mamar~ɾaŋ kanakanavu miana.
S.FORM: 'una kani mamarang kanakanavu miana.
S.PHON: ʔuna kani mamar~ɾaŋ kanakanavu miana.
S.TRANSL: 據說以前有卡那卡那富的老人家.
It is said that there was an old Kanakanavu person.

S.FORM: sua kari iisi ia manasʉ koopakam tunmana.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾi iisi ia manasɨ koopakam tunmana.
S.FORM: sua kari iisi ia manasʉ koopakam tunmana.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾi iisi ia manasɨ koopakam tunmana.
S.TRANSL: 這個話,或許你們未曾聽過.
As for this story, perhaps you haven't heard about it.

S.FORM: teku poisua paraa'ʉna masiin poisua 'inia.
S.PHON: teku poisua par~ɾaaʔɨna masiin poisua ʔinia.
S.FORM: teku poisua paraa'ʉna masiin poisua 'inia.
S.PHON: teku poisua par~ɾaaʔɨna masiin poisua ʔinia.

TRANSL.notes: 現在我要聊一聊關於...說關於那個(的事情).

S.TRANSL: 現在我要聊一聊關於...說關於那個 .
Now I want to chat about...say about that.

S.FORM: 'una kan mamarang miana nimusa kan rʉmʉra nimusa kan rʉmʉra.
S.PHON: ʔuna kan mamar~ɾaŋ miana nimusa kan r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa nimusa kan r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.FORM: 'una kan mamarang miana nimusa kan rʉmʉra nimusa kan rʉmʉra.
S.PHON: ʔuna kan mamar~ɾaŋ miana nimusa kan r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa nimusa kan r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 傳說以前有老者去過叢林.
It is said that there was an old person going to the jungle.

S.FORM: makasi kan sua kʉkʉnangiin tanama teen para kicacʉ sua cau iisi misa kan.
S.PHON: makasi kan sua kɨkɨnaŋiin tanama teen par~ɾa kiʦaʦɨ sua ʦau iisi misa kan.
S.FORM: makasi kan sua kʉkʉnangiin tanama teen para kicacʉ sua cau iisi misa kan.
S.PHON: makasi kan sua kɨkɨnaŋiin tanama teen par~ɾa kiʦaʦɨ sua ʦau iisi misa kan.

TRANSL.notes: 他的同伴說:「(我們)試著嚇嚇這個人.」

S.TRANSL: 他的同伴說:「 試著嚇嚇這個人.」
His partner said, "Let's try to frighten this person."

S.FORM: ʉʉ'ʉ misa kan taciin.
S.PHON: ɨɨʔɨ misa kan taʦiin.
S.FORM: ʉʉ'ʉ misa kan taciin.
S.PHON: ɨɨʔɨ misa kan taʦiin.
S.TRANSL: 另外一個人說「好啊.」
Another person said "OK."

S.FORM: parakicacʉ kan nia.
S.PHON: par~ɾakiʦaʦɨ kan nia.
S.FORM: parakicacʉ kan nia.
S.PHON: par~ɾakiʦaʦɨ kan nia.
S.TRANSL: 「嚇那一位」

TRANSL.notes: "frighten that (man)"

S.TRANSL: "frighten that "

S.FORM: 'a'a tecikita makenanu.
S.PHON: ʔaʔa teʦikita makenanu.
S.FORM: 'a'a tecikita makenanu.
S.PHON: ʔaʔa teʦikita makenanu.
S.TRANSL: 「啊,我們要如何啦?」
"Ah, how should we do?"

S.FORM: misa 'una cau 'esi tia umakakakitana misa kan.
S.PHON: misa ʔuna ʦau ʔesi tia umakakakitana misa kan.
S.FORM: misa 'una cau 'esi tia umakakakitana misa kan.
S.PHON: misa ʔuna ʦau ʔesi tia umakakakitana misa kan.

TRANSL.notes: (其中一個)說:「有人正要傷害我們.」

S.TRANSL: 說:「有人正要傷害我們.」

TRANSL.notes: (One of them) said, "There is someone wanting to damage us."

S.TRANSL: said, "There is someone wanting to damage us."

W.TRANSL: 主焦-重疊-不好=1PL.排除.斜格

S.FORM: makasuacu sua cau taciin isua.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sua ʦau taʦiin isua.
S.FORM: makasuacu sua cau taciin isua.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sua ʦau taʦiin isua.

TRANSL.notes: 那一個人(另外一個人)就那樣.

S.TRANSL: 那一個人 就那樣.

TRANSL.notes: That man (the other) was in that way.

S.TRANSL: That man was in that way.

S.FORM: 'ʉʉ nakai miaa maka'uru ia 'una kan 'ʉʉ sua 'utinni ia 'ʉʉ tupuruiin kan nia takipʉnʉn kan kee sua 'utinni na ʉnʉ'ʉnai.
S.PHON: ʔɨɨ nakai miaa makaʔur~ɾu ia ʔuna kan ʔɨɨ sua ʔutinni ia ʔɨɨ tupur~ɾuiin kan nia takipɨnɨn kan kee sua ʔutinni na ɨnɨʔɨnai.
S.FORM: 'ʉʉ nakai miaa maka'uru ia 'una kan 'ʉʉ sua 'utinni ia 'ʉʉ tupuruiin kan nia takipʉnʉn kan kee sua 'utinni na ʉnʉ'ʉnai.
S.PHON: ʔɨɨ nakai miaa makaʔur~ɾu ia ʔuna kan ʔɨɨ sua ʔutinni ia ʔɨɨ tupur~ɾuiin kan nia takipɨnɨn kan kee sua ʔutinni na ɨnɨʔɨnai.
S.TRANSL: 首先,有他的生殖器,如果坐著,他的生殖器就會盤繞在地上.
At first, there was his genital; if he sat, his genital would coil on the ground.

S.FORM: noo makasiin kan cau tuu teku mosiparʉ 'akia tapeca misa kani ia.
S.PHON: noo makasiin kan ʦau tuu teku mosipar~ɾɨ ʔakia tapeʦa misa kani ia.
S.FORM: noo makasiin kan cau tuu teku mosiparʉ 'akia tapeca misa kani ia.
S.PHON: noo makasiin kan ʦau tuu teku mosipar~ɾɨ ʔakia tapeʦa misa kani ia.

TRANSL.notes: 我想要涉水到對岸,(但說)沒有通道.

S.TRANSL: 我想要涉水到對岸, 沒有通道.

TRANSL.notes: I wanted to go to the opposite bank through water, (but he) said there was no passage.

S.TRANSL: I wanted to go to the opposite bank through water, said there was no passage.

S.FORM: arisʉ'ʉrʉnkan kee 'utini mari marikusa sipara.
S.PHON: ar~ɾisɨʔɨr~ɾɨnkan kee ʔutini mar~ɾi mar~ɾikusa sipar~ɾa.
S.FORM: arisʉ'ʉrʉnkan kee 'utini mari marikusa sipara.
S.PHON: ar~ɾisɨʔɨr~ɾɨnkan kee ʔutini mar~ɾi mar~ɾikusa sipar~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 他拉著他的生殖器到對岸.
He pulled his genital to the opposite bank.

S.FORM: mo motʉtʉnaa sian kisʉʉn kan kee sua cau.
S.PHON: mo motɨtɨnaa sian kisɨɨn kan kee sua ʦau.
S.FORM: mo motʉtʉnaa sian kisʉʉn kan kee sua cau.
S.PHON: mo motɨtɨnaa sian kisɨɨn kan kee sua ʦau.
S.TRANSL: 他跟別人說:「走我這個地方.」
He said to others, "Go through my place here."

W.TRANSL: 主焦-去-重疊-通道-關係詞

S.FORM: makasuacu araneecu nia taniuru'ecu kan cau tumani'ura e rʉmʉra.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ar~ɾaneeʦu nia taniur~ɾuʔeʦu kan ʦau tumaniʔur~ɾa e r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.FORM: makasuacu araneecu nia taniuru'ecu kan cau tumani'ura e rʉmʉra.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu ar~ɾaneeʦu nia taniur~ɾuʔeʦu kan ʦau tumaniʔur~ɾa e r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 人們就在那裡給他搗蛋.

TRANSL.notes: The persons then acted up there (on his genital).

S.TRANSL: The persons then acted up there .

S.FORM: 'a ta mo'ʉnakita 'una etia miakakakitana cau misa kan.
S.PHON: ʔa ta moʔɨnakita ʔuna etia miakakakitana ʦau misa kan.
S.FORM: 'a ta mo'ʉnakita 'una etia miakakakitana cau misa kan.
S.PHON: ʔa ta moʔɨnakita ʔuna etia miakakakitana ʦau misa kan.
S.TRANSL: 「啊,走吧,我們逃離,有人正要傷害我們.」
"Ah, let's go, let's escape, there is someone wanting to damage us."

S.FORM: makasuacu te kan manguru.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu te kan maŋur~ɾu.
S.FORM: makasuacu te kan manguru.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu te kan maŋur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,要逃跑了.

TRANSL.notes: That way, (we) wanted to escape.

S.TRANSL: That way, wanted to escape.

S.FORM: ariupupange kan mamia nia sii nimangurucu cucumeen.
S.PHON: ar~ɾiupupaŋe kan mamia nia sii nimaŋur~ɾuʦu ʦuʦumeen.
S.FORM: ariupupange kan mamia nia sii nimangurucu cucumeen.
S.PHON: ar~ɾiupupaŋe kan mamia nia sii nimaŋur~ɾuʦu ʦuʦumeen.
S.TRANSL: 他們只能在那邊慌亂,因為別人都已經逃走了.

TRANSL.notes: They had no choice but to lose their head there, becuase (all) others already escaped.

S.TRANSL: They had no choice but to lose their head there, becuase others already escaped.

S.FORM: kan makai iikia sua makahua naturu manasʉ tananiin pacʉpʉcʉpʉʉng makahua si makai iikia 'akia tavarʉ'een.
S.PHON: kan makai iikia sua makahua natur~ɾu manasɨ tananiin paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨɨŋ makahua si makai iikia ʔakia tavar~ɾɨʔeen.
S.FORM: kan makai iikia sua makahua naturu manasʉ tananiin pacʉpʉcʉpʉʉng makahua si makai iikia 'akia tavarʉ'een.
S.PHON: kan makai iikia sua makahua natur~ɾu manasɨ tananiin paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨɨŋ makahua si makai iikia ʔakia tavar~ɾɨʔeen.
S.TRANSL: 像我一樣呆呆的,沒有他所知道的.
Like me, who was silly and didn't have something I knew.

S.FORM: te kan manguru maica kana ra'u'uarara.
S.PHON: te kan maŋur~ɾu maiʦa kana r~ɾaʔuʔuar~ɾar~ɾa.
S.FORM: te kan manguru maica kana ra'u'uarara.
S.PHON: te kan maŋur~ɾu maiʦa kana r~ɾaʔuʔuar~ɾar~ɾa.

TRANSL.notes: (他)要逃跑,(但)經過很多黃藤的地方.

S.TRANSL: 要逃跑, 經過很多黃藤的地方.

TRANSL.notes: (He) wanted to escape, (but) went through the places rich in yellow rattan.

S.TRANSL: wanted to escape, went through the places rich in yellow rattan.

S.FORM: ari'uru'uree kan nia sua 'utini mesua ra'u'uarara makasuacu kan miaranasʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾiʔur~ɾuʔur~ɾee kan nia sua ʔutini mesua r~ɾaʔuʔuar~ɾar~ɾa makasuaʦu kan miar~ɾanasɨ.
S.FORM: ari'uru'uree kan nia sua 'utini mesua ra'u'uarara makasuacu kan miaranasʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾiʔur~ɾuʔur~ɾee kan nia sua ʔutini mesua r~ɾaʔuʔuar~ɾar~ɾa makasuaʦu kan miar~ɾanasɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 他拖拉著他的生殖器(經過)黃藤區,就這樣很痛苦.

S.TRANSL: 他拖拉著他的生殖器 黃藤區,就這樣很痛苦.

TRANSL.notes: He dragged his genital (through) the places of yellow rattan, feeling toilsome in that way.

S.TRANSL: He dragged his genital the places of yellow rattan, feeling toilsome in that way.

S.FORM: sua 'utini ia tecu kan takukingti.
S.PHON: sua ʔutini ia teʦu kan takukiŋti.
S.FORM: sua 'utini ia tecu kan takukingti.
S.PHON: sua ʔutini ia teʦu kan takukiŋti.
S.TRANSL: His wanted to pull the thorn away from his genital.
他的生殖器要拔刺.

S.FORM: makasi kan makahi kan tu temaku teku poso'uma takukingti 'utinaku misee kan.
S.PHON: makasi kan makahi kan tu temaku teku posoʔuma takukiŋti ʔutinaku misee kan.
S.FORM: makasi kan makahi kan tu temaku teku poso'uma takukingti 'utinaku misee kan.
S.PHON: makasi kan makahi kan tu temaku teku posoʔuma takukiŋti ʔutinaku misee kan.
S.TRANSL: 他說:「我要用我的生殖器作為代價來請人工作.」
He said, "I wanted to ask someone to work at the cost of my genital."

S.FORM: nakai tia naannakʉ kan kavangvang 'aaka kan saronee.
S.PHON: nakai tia naannakɨ kan kavaŋvaŋ ʔaaka kan sar~ɾonee.
S.FORM: nakai tia naannakʉ kan kavangvang 'aaka kan saronee.
S.PHON: nakai tia naannakɨ kan kavaŋvaŋ ʔaaka kan sar~ɾonee.
S.TRANSL: 但是都要是女性,男人不行.
But all should be women, man are not OK.

S.FORM: nakai mia teci kan takukingti ia nimucapa kan cʉmʉʉra naannakʉ si 'esi tikirimin kee kan sua maningcau.
S.PHON: nakai mia teʦi kan takukiŋti ia nimuʦapa kan ʦɨmɨɨr~ɾa naannakɨ si ʔesi tikir~ɾimin kee kan sua maniŋʦau.
S.FORM: nakai mia teci kan takukingti ia nimucapa kan cʉmʉʉra naannakʉ si 'esi tikirimin kee kan sua maningcau.
S.PHON: nakai mia teʦi kan takukiŋti ia nimuʦapa kan ʦɨmɨɨr~ɾa naannakɨ si ʔesi tikir~ɾimin kee kan sua maniŋʦau.
S.TRANSL: 但是當要拔刺的時候,他曾離去看女生,因為他要尋找好看的.

TRANSL.notes: But when he was going to pull thorns, he (once) went to see the women, because he wanted to look for the good-looking ones.

S.TRANSL: But when he was going to pull thorns, he went to see the women, because he wanted to look for the good-looking ones.

S.FORM: sua mamaʉng kan cau ia tekanu uturu sua na uti umutucu kan 'utini takukingti.
S.PHON: sua mamaɨŋ kan ʦau ia tekanu utur~ɾu sua na uti umutuʦu kan ʔutini takukiŋti.
S.FORM: sua mamaʉng kan cau ia tekanu uturu sua na uti umutucu kan 'utini takukingti.
S.PHON: sua mamaɨŋ kan ʦau ia tekanu utur~ɾu sua na uti umutuʦu kan ʔutini takukiŋti.
S.TRANSL: 那個好看的人,要拔三包生殖器的刺.
The good looking one wanted to pull out three packs of thorns of the genital.

S.FORM: XXXX makahuacu mara kan toomarU umara kan toomarU tia takukingti.
S.PHON: **** makahuaʦu mar~ɾa kan toomar~ɾu umar~ɾa kan toomar~ɾu tia takukiŋti.
S.FORM: XXXX makahuacu mara kan toomarU umara kan toomarU tia takukingti.
S.PHON: **** makahuaʦu mar~ɾa kan toomar~ɾu umar~ɾa kan toomar~ɾu tia takukiŋti.
S.TRANSL: 他拿簸箕要拔刺.
He took a bamboo container in order to pull out the thorns.

S.FORM: sua tia tasUU'a kingti 'utini ia tecu kan kuratumuru toomarU.
S.PHON: sua tia tasuuʔa kiŋti ʔutini ia teʦu kan kur~ɾatumur~ɾu toomar~ɾu.
S.FORM: sua tia tasUU'a kingti 'utini ia tecu kan kuratumuru toomarU.
S.PHON: sua tia tasuuʔa kiŋti ʔutini ia teʦu kan kur~ɾatumur~ɾu toomar~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 那個簸箕裡刺將要滿了.
The bamboo container was going to be full of thorns.

S.FORM: tia posoo'uma kan posoo'uma kan po'o takukingti 'utini.
S.PHON: tia posooʔuma kan posooʔuma kan poʔo takukiŋti ʔutini.
S.FORM: tia posoo'uma kan posoo'uma kan po'o takukingti 'utini.
S.PHON: tia posooʔuma kan posooʔuma kan poʔo takukiŋti ʔutini.
S.TRANSL: 那個簸箕裡刺將要滿了.
The bamboo container was going to be full of thorns.

S.FORM: makasuacu macaca kan macaca macaca kan nannakU.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu maʦaʦa kan maʦaʦa maʦaʦa kan nannaku.
S.FORM: makasuacu macaca kan macaca macaca kan nannakU.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu maʦaʦa kan maʦaʦa maʦaʦa kan nannaku.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣,女人都笑了.
Women laughed that way.

S.FORM: atii 'utiinpai kUcU mananu mamanUUng maa natuuru misi kan.
S.PHON: atii ʔutiinpai kuʦu mananu mamanuuŋ maa natuur~ɾu misi kan.
S.FORM: atii 'utiinpai kUcU mananu mamanUUng maa natuuru misi kan.
S.PHON: atii ʔutiinpai kuʦu mananu mamanuuŋ maa natuur~ɾu misi kan.

TRANSL.notes: 「什麼生殖器啦?(這樣)好嗎?」(她們)說:「呆瓜啊.」

S.TRANSL: 「什麼生殖器啦? 好嗎?」 說:「呆瓜啊.」

TRANSL.notes: "What on earth is that genital? Is it OK?" (they) said, "idiot."

S.TRANSL: "What on earth is that genital? Is it OK?" said, "idiot."

S.FORM: macaca kan saronai isua saronai kan isua 'a'ah.
S.PHON: maʦaʦa kan sar~ɾonai isua sar~ɾonai kan isua ʔaʔah.
S.FORM: macaca kan saronai isua saronai kan isua 'a'ah.
S.PHON: maʦaʦa kan sar~ɾonai isua sar~ɾonai kan isua ʔaʔah.
S.TRANSL: 那個男人笑出來.呸!
That man laughed. Ah!

S.FORM: 'akuun maa pokarikari taku ku tamaiara takukingti sii.
S.PHON: ʔakuun maa pokar~ɾikar~ɾi taku ku tamaiar~ɾa takukiŋti sii.
S.FORM: 'akuun maa pokarikari taku ku tamaiara takukingti sii.
S.PHON: ʔakuun maa pokar~ɾikar~ɾi taku ku tamaiar~ɾa takukiŋti sii.
S.TRANSL: 「不要講話,只要勤勞地拔刺,因為...」
"Don't talk and pull out the thorns alone, because..."

S.FORM: uma'UngUrU aiakU aiakU misi kan 'esi uma'UngUrU.
S.PHON: umaʔuŋur~ɾu aiaku aiaku misi kan ʔesi umaʔuŋur~ɾu.
S.FORM: uma'UngUrU aiakU aiakU misi kan 'esi uma'UngUrU.
S.PHON: umaʔuŋur~ɾu aiaku aiaku misi kan ʔesi umaʔuŋur~ɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 他呻吟著「唉唷唉唷」,(一直)在呻吟.

S.TRANSL: 他呻吟著「唉唷唉唷」, 在呻吟.

TRANSL.notes: He moaned, "ouch ouch"; he (kept) moaning.

S.TRANSL: He moaned, "ouch ouch"; he moaning.

S.FORM: 'esi kan araamUn nannakU sua kingti 'utini umarUn kan makahi.
S.PHON: ʔesi kan ar~ɾaamun nannaku sua kiŋti ʔutini umar~ɾun kan makahi.
S.FORM: 'esi kan araamUn nannakU sua kingti 'utini umarUn kan makahi.
S.PHON: ʔesi kan ar~ɾaamun nannaku sua kiŋti ʔutini umar~ɾun kan makahi.
S.TRANSL: 女孩子在撿生殖器上的刺.
The women were picking the thorns on the genital.

S.FORM: tecu kan kuratumuru kan toomaru sua kingti nimoon na 'utini.
S.PHON: teʦu kan kur~ɾatumur~ɾu kan toomar~ɾu sua kiŋti nimoon na ʔutini.
S.FORM: tecu kan kuratumuru kan toomaru sua kingti nimoon na 'utini.
S.PHON: teʦu kan kur~ɾatumur~ɾu kan toomar~ɾu sua kiŋti nimoon na ʔutini.
S.TRANSL: 曾經在生殖器上的刺快裝滿簸箕了.
The bamboo container was going to be filled with the thorn once on the genital.

S.FORM: makasuacu kan po'U XXXX nimepacai kan tutui nimepacai kan tutui posoo'uma takukingti 'utini.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu kan poʔu **** nimepaʦai kan tutui nimepaʦai kan tutui posooʔuma takukiŋti ʔutini.
S.FORM: makasuacu kan po'U XXXX nimepacai kan tutui nimepacai kan tutui posoo'uma takukingti 'utini.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu kan poʔu **** nimepaʦai kan tutui nimepaʦai kan tutui posooʔuma takukiŋti ʔutini.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣,已經殺過豬來請人拔生殖器的刺.

TRANSL.notes: That way, (he) had had others pull out the thorns on genitals with the reward of killed pigs.

S.TRANSL: That way, had had others pull out the thorns on genitals with the reward of killed pigs.
